question: Which language is the most popular in Aruba?
gold_sql: SELECT T2.Language FROM country AS T1 JOIN countrylanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code  =  T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.Name  =  "Aruba" ORDER BY Percentage DESC LIMIT 1
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.lang FROM countrylanguage AS T1 JOIN country AS T2 ON T1.coun = T2.code WHERE T2.nm = 'Aruba' ORDER BY T1.perc DESC LIMIT 1;
raw_response: SELECT T1.lang FROM countrylanguage AS T1 JOIN country AS T2 ON T1.coun = T2.code WHERE T2.nm = 'Aruba' ORDER BY T1.perc DESC LIMIT 1;
